tagline: AI/ML Engineer & Automation Specialist with expertise in Computer Vision, Deep Learning, and Robotics.
description: Automation and Robotics student with expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Data Science. Skilled in Python, Java, TensorFlow, and Scikit-learn for developing AI-powered, data-driven solutions and predictive analytics models.

roles.detailed: Python | Computer Vision Specialist | AI & Robotics Enthusiast

bio: Passionate Automation and Robotics student with strong expertise in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and Data Science. Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, and OpenCV for developing intelligent automation systems. Experienced in building end-to-end ML pipelines, computer vision applications, real-time data analytics dashboards, and embedded systems integration. Currently pursuing undergraduate degree in Automation & Robotics with CGPA 9.34, and actively developing AI-powered solutions for healthcare analytics, financial forecasting, and robotic automation.

bullets: Architected 3 Python-based AI/ML applications using Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and data analytics techniques.
Developed character recognition model using TensorFlow and OpenCV with 94% accuracy for optical character recognition tasks.
Built real-time stock market dashboard with REST API integration for live data visualization of 500+ stock symbols.
Designed credit risk assessment model using Scikit-learn and XGBoost with 92% prediction accuracy for financial analytics.
experience.desc: Full-stack AI/ML development with focus on computer vision, deep learning, and real-time data analytics applications.

bullets: Led and managed team of 124 members to drive product awareness, customer engagement, and sales growth.
Executed targeted marketing campaigns and sales strategies to improve product visibility and market penetration.
Improved Seabuckthorn product sales through strategic business development and customer relationship management.
Strengthened leadership, business development, sales strategy, and team management capabilities.
experience.desc: Business development and team leadership for sales growth, marketing strategy, and customer engagement.

projects.title: Computer Vision Robotic Manipulator
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Autonomous System
projects.desc: Built intelligent robotic arm using Deep Learning, YOLOv3, and Arduino embedded systems, achieving 96% object detection accuracy. Implemented real-time object tracking with OpenCV and integrated 3D-printed components with servo motors for autonomous robotic operation.

projects.title: Heart Disease Prediction Model
projects.subtitle: Healthcare Analytics & ML Pipeline
projects.desc: Constructed end-to-end Machine Learning pipeline using Scikit-learn, Pandas, and NumPy for predictive healthcare analytics, achieving 89% classification accuracy and 91% precision through data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization.

projects.title: Real-Time Stock Market Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Financial Analytics & Data Visualization
projects.desc: Designed real-time stock market analytics dashboard using Python and financial APIs to visualize live and historical data for 500+ stock symbols. Integrated interactive data visualization and technical analysis features using Matplotlib and Seaborn for trend analysis and data-driven investment insights.

projects.title: Attendance Management System
projects.subtitle: Real-Time Face Recognition
projects.desc: Built a real-time attendance management system using face recognition and OpenCV to automatically mark attendance. Implemented live camera feed processing, face detection and identification, and backend storage for attendance logs to deliver an efficient and secure automated attendance workflow.
